svg:svg.svg:text: RF and LR agree: num_O and TPSA are the two most influential features for predicting Eb
Consistent top-2 ranking across RF importance and LR |coefficients|
Lower HOMO energy → stronger binding (higher electronegativity)
num_O & HBA positively correlated with Eb
More O atoms and H-bond acceptors → more coordination with Pb²⁺
Larger polar surface → more hydrogen bonding → stronger binding
Source: RF importance (Gini) + LR coefficients (L2 regularization, C=1.0)
